findings.summary: Flight computer with OSD3358 SiP, MIMXRT1062, sensors, LoRa, GPS. Good basic parsing but SPI-as-I2C false positives, LDO inverting flag errors, and TVS IC detection gaps.

correct.description: Crystal Y101 40MHz with load caps correctly detected
CAN bus detection with MCP2518FDT and TCAN337G correct

incorrect.description: TLV75733PDRV LDOs (U305, U505) marked as inverting=true -- TLV757xx is a standard positive fixed-output LDO

suggestions: Add Power_Protection library components to protection_devices detection
Fix LDO inverting flag -- TLV757xx and similar fixed-output LDOs should not be marked inverting
